question: What does the singer say about 'every inch of your skin'?

It is the color of my blood
It is the cure and the pain
It is the light and the night

options: Feeling it, breathing out, on the edge of paradise
The grand finale of the joystick of Passion Show

My heart is the color of blood

question: What does the singer say about their truthfulness?

We will set the place together

answer_en: To cause strong feelings of passion or love

options: To touch in a special or meaningful way
